_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of Patients and Providers on Chronic Pain Assessment in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1): A Qualitative Study.

_contextSnippet: We identified three themes across the data from both participant groups: (1) Describing the Physical CP Experience, (2) Treating and Dealing With CP, and (3) Attitudes About Current Pain Measures
details: Used for qualitative data analysis to identify three main themes across patient and provider data
